docs.text: Welcome VShop is a mobile app for iOS & Android which makes it possible to check your Valorant store as easy as it can be. We believe in privacy . Therefore, we do not store any data on our servers. All data is stored locally on your device. For more information, see our documentation under Security . You can download VShop via Google Play Store and Apple App Store . For additional support, please join our Discord Server . If you have general problems with your game (with payments for example) please contact Riot Games directly.
docs.title: Welcome

docs.text: FAQ Where can I download the app? Downloads are available for Android and iOS . Why can't I see my shop in the browser anymore? VShop is available for Android and since recently for IOS, therefore the Web version of VShop was been discontinued. Can I buy skins with VShop? No, you are not able to buy skins in the app and this will most likely not change. Can I get free VP, RP, ...? No.
docs.title: FAQ

docs.text: No.
docs.title: Can I get free VP, RP, ...?

docs.text: Danger Please download the app from official sources only. Third-party stores can be malicious. Is VShop safe? VShop is secure. We do not process or collect any account data. When you log in, we use a specific cookie string that makes it possible to request an API (Application Programming Interface) and get all the data about your store. No passwords are transmitted & stored. Can I be banned if I use VShop? Riot Games officially said in a Tweet that using unauthorized third party apps is bannable. Although it is not 100% certain that they really ban accounts for that. We have not yet received any notice of an actual ban due to the use of our app. Nevertheless, the use is at your own risk. We assume no liability for any damage to your account.
docs.title: Security

docs.text: VShop is secure. We do not process or collect any account data. When you log in, we use a specific cookie string that makes it possible to request an API (Application Programming Interface) and get all the data about your store. No passwords are transmitted & stored.

We have not yet received any notice of an actual ban due to the use of our app. Nevertheless, the use is at your own risk. We assume no liability for any damage to your account.
docs.title: Can I be banned if I use VShop?

docs.text: You receive an "Access Denied - Error code: 1020" message after you log in. Check version Please check that you have the newest update of the V-Shop app. Check DNS & VPN settings The following should be disabled: - Public DNS (like Cloudflare 1.1.1.1) also apps like Cloudflare WARP - VPN (of all public services, like NordVPN) VPN should always be disabled, because Cloudflare detects them most of the time. The login could also be blocked in public WLANs by certain policies. Check network (WLAN) An active internet connection is required to log in. Certain protocols might be blocked on your network (e.g. guests & school WLAN). Try another network. If the problem still exists, please contact us on our Discord .
docs.title: Access Denied

docs.text: Please check that you have the newest update of the V-Shop app.
docs.title: Check version

docs.text: The following should be disabled: - Public DNS (like Cloudflare 1.1.1.1) also apps like Cloudflare WARP - VPN (of all public services, like NordVPN) VPN should always be disabled, because Cloudflare detects them most of the time. The login could also be blocked in public WLANs by certain policies.
docs.title: Check DNS & VPN settings

docs.text: "My app loads infinitely after I log in" The app loads infinitely. Even after a waiting time of 2 minutes & few attempts. Check version Please check that you have the newest update of the V-Shop app. Check your internet connection You need an active internet connection. One reason for a long loading time could be bad signal or internet speed. Check your Internet connection. If possible, try another network. Try another language Please try to change the language in the app. You can change the language under "Settings" in the menu. Delete app cache & storage If the problem remains, please remove all app content through your operating system. On Android, try this guide . On iOS, it is mandatory to reinstall the app. If the problem still exists, please contact us on our Discord .
docs.title: Stuck loading

docs.text: "Login with Facebook, Google, Apple doesn't work" Unfortunately, we cannot offer a login with third-party services at the current time. This is technically not possible. Login via Facebook, Google and Apple account is therefore not possible. To still use VShop you can reset your password here and log in normally with email & password without third-party service. Please make sure to set the correct region. If you have any further questions or problems, please feel free to contact us on our Discord .
docs.title: Third Party login

Please make sure to set the correct region. If you have any further questions or problems, please feel free to contact us on our Discord .
docs.title: "Login with Facebook, Google, Apple doesn't work"

docs.text: Your app is (completely) white. You only have an X button in the top left corner. Check version Please check that you have the newest update of the V-Shop app. "Access Denied" It could be that Riot Games' Cloudflare proxy has interfered, but does not display an error message. Try the Access Denied fix anyway. Delete app cache & storage If the problem persists, please remove all app content through your operating system. On Android, try this guide . On iOS, it is mandatory to reinstall the app. If the problem still exists, please contact us on our Discord .

docs.title: Check version
